title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
